project.title: Targeted LC-MS/MS analysis of oSCRIB protein in HeLa cells.
project.projectDescription: LC-MS/MS analysis of small HeLa proteins (approximately 10–15 kDa) for detecting oSCRIB protein with Parallel Reaction Monitoring (PRM) mode.
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: Frozen HeLa cells were thawed on ice and lysed by ultrasonic treatment in a solution containing 50 mM sodium phosphate buffer (pH 7.9) and 500 mM NaCl. The cell extracts were applied to SDS-PAGE for protein separation.The protein bands that corresponded to endogenous HeLa proteins of approximately 10–15 kDa, which included oSCRIB protein, were excised from the SDS-PAGE gels. The small HeLa proteins in the gel slices were digested in-gel with trypsin at 37°C for 16 h and the resultant peptides were analyzed by LC-MS/MS for detecting oSCRIB protein with Parallel Reaction Monitoring (PRM) mode.
project.dataProcessingProtocol: A raw MS/MS file was converted into MGF files using Thermo Proteome Discoverer 2.2.0.388 (Thermo Fisher Scientific). The MGF files were submitted to an in-house Mascot Server 2.7.0 (Matrix Science, London, UK) and subjected to Peptide-Spectrum Matching (PSM) searches by the Mascot algorithm through Thermo Proteome Discoverer with the following parameters: variable modifications, acetyl (protein N-term), oxidation (M), and Gln to pyro-Glu conversion (N-term Q); static modification, carboxymethyl (C); maximum of three missed cleavages by trypsin digestion; precursor mass tolerance of 15 ppm; fragment mass tolerance of 30 mmu.

references.referenceLine: Nomura Y, Dohmae N. Discovery of a small protein-encoding cis-regulatory overlapping gene of the tumor suppressor gene Scribble in humans. Commun Biol. 2021 4(1):1098

Characteristics[MaterialType]: raw datasets comprising tryptic mass spectra of the human proteome from cancer cell lines (HeLa, MCF-7, A549, and HCT-116; two biological replicates for each cell line) deposited in ProteomeXchange (dataset identifier PXD004452) by Bekker-Jensen et al.
Comment[Instrument]: Q Exactive hybrid Quadrupole-Orbitrap mass spectrometer (Thermo Fisher Scientific)
Comment[MS2MassAnalyzer]: in the Orbitrap (resolution, 17,500; automatic gain-control target, 500,000; maximum injection time, 100 ms; isolation window, 4.0 m/z; normalized collision energy, 30%)
Comment[GradientTime]: increasing the proportion of eluent B to eluent A from 0% to 100% over 12 min (35% at 10 min and 100% at 12 min). The last condition was maintained for 8 min.
Comment[NumberOfMissedCleavages]: maximum of three missed cleavages by trypsin digestion
Comment[FractionationMethod]: off-line high-pH reversed-phase fractionation of peptides
